message: Node started: Design an optimal querying strategy to identify hidden polyominoes on a grid. Given a set of known polyomino shapes and a noise parameter, determine how to use single-cell queries (q 1 x y) and multi-cell aggregate queries (q k x1 y1 ...) to minimize total cost. Focus on how to use aggregate queries to detect presence/absence of oil in regions and how to refine locations using single-cell drills. Provide a mathematical approach for deciding when to switch from aggregate to single-cell queries based on the noise parameter and the known shapes.
